```{r}
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Gata4/Gata6:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Gata4_Gata6_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.3 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Elf5_Gata3_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the two genes of interest
gene1 <- "Elf5"
gene2 <- "Gata3"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Elf5_Gata3.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing both genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the two genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Elf5/Gata3+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Elf5/Gata3:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Elf5_Gata3_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.3 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Elf5_Gata3_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()


```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# Define the three genes of interest
gene1 <- "Nanog"
gene2 <- "Pou5f1"
gene3 <- "Sox2"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Nanog_Pou5f1_Sox2.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all three genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the three genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Nanog/Pou5f1/Sox2+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Nanog/Pou5f1/Sox2:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Nanog_Pou5f1_Sox2_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Nanog_Pou5f1_Sox2_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```


```{r}
# Define the two genes of interest
gene1 <- "Krt18"
gene2 <- "Krt8"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Krt18_Krt8.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing both genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the two genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Postn/Pitx2+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Krt18/Krt8:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4__Krt18_Krt8_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Krt18_Krt8_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```


```{r}
# Define the two genes of interest
gene1 <- "Postn"
gene2 <- "Pitx2"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Postn_Pitx2.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing both genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the two genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Postn/Pitx2+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Postn/Pitx2:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Postn_Pitx2_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Postn_Pitx2_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()


```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# Define the three genes of interest
gene1 <- "Wnt6"
gene2 <- "Lrp2"
gene3 <- "Egfr"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Wnt6_Lrp2_Egfr.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all three genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the three genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) + coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Wnt6_Lrp2_Egfr_expression.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.05 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_expression_Wnt6_Lrp2_Egfr.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

```

```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)

# Define the three genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tac2"
gene2 <- "Muc16"
gene3 <- "Ppbp"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all three genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                              gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the three genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),    # Larger title
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),                  # Larger legend text
    panel.grid = element_blank(), 
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),                   # Larger legend symbols
    legend.title = element_blank(),                         # Remove the legend title
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")               # Add axis lines
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) + 
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) + coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb_expression.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.05 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_expression_Tac2_Muc16_Pbpb.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)
```

```{r}

#keep in case i want to check later 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tfrc"
gene2 <- "Dio3"
gene3 <- "Hbegf"
gene4 <- "Glis1"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 &
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, 
                                                     levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data so that the "No Expression" cells are plotted first and "Wnt6/Lrp2/Egfr+" cells are plotted last
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]
# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis:", 
                     round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot as PNG
png_filename <- paste0("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_", gene4, "_Expression.png")
ggsave(filename = png_filename,
       plot = p, 
       width = 8, 
       height = 6, 
       units = "in", 
       dpi = 300,
       device = "png")

# Print the plot
print(p)


# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.1 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Tfrc_Dio_Hbegf_Glis_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()
```
```{r}
#keep in case i want to check later - EPC markers?

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Tpbpa"
gene2 <- "Hand1"
gene3 <- "Tfap2c"
gene4 <- "Gjb3"

# Create a PDF to save the plots
pdf("D0D4_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3.pdf")

# Get gene expression data for the genes of interest
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Identify cells expressing all four genes
cells_expressing_all <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] > 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] > 0 &
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] > 0)

# Identify cells expressing none of the four genes
cells_expressing_none <- which(gene_expression[gene1, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene2, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene3, ] == 0 & 
                               gene_expression[gene4, ] == 0)

# Create a factor variable for labeling
D0.D4$expression_status <- "No Expression"
D0.D4$expression_status[cells_expressing_all] <- paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")

# Convert the expression_status to a factor and reorder the cells in the data frame
D0.D4$expression_status <- factor(D0.D4$expression_status, 
                                                     levels = c("No Expression", paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "+", sep = "")))

# Extract the UMAP coordinates
umap_data <- as.data.frame(Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap"))
umap_data$expression_status <- D0.D4$expression_status

# Reorder the umap_data
umap_data <- umap_data[order(umap_data$expression_status),]

# Create the plot using ggplot2
p <- ggplot(umap_data, aes(x = umap_1, y = umap_2, color = expression_status)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey70", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) + guides(color = guide_legend(override.aes = list(size = 3))) +
  labs(title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "/", gene4, "Expression\n",
                     "Percent expressing:", round(length(cells_expressing_all) / ncol(D0.D4) * 100, 2), "%")) +
  coord_fixed()

# Save the plot
ggsave(paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_", gene4, "_Expression.png", sep = ""), 
       plot = p, width = 8, height = 6, units = "in", dpi = 300)

# Print the plot
print(p)

# Extract metadata and expression data for the identified cells
metadata <- D0.D4@meta.data
expressing_cells_metadata <- metadata[cells_expressing_all, ]

# Get the list of unique conditions where these cells are found
conditions_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(conditions_with_expression, "D0D4_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3_expression_conditions.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(conditions_with_expression)

# Group by SCT_snn_res.0.6 and count the cells
clusters_with_expression <- expressing_cells_metadata %>%
  group_by(SCT_snn_res.0.6) %>%
  summarise(num_cells_expressing_all = n()) %>%
  arrange(desc(num_cells_expressing_all))

# Save the result to a CSV file
write.csv(clusters_with_expression, "D0D4_Tpbpa_Hand1_Tfap2c_Gjb3_expression_clusters.csv", row.names = FALSE)

# Print the result to the console for review
print(clusters_with_expression)

# Close the PDF
dev.off()

```

```{r}

# Define the genes of interest in the desired order
genes <- c("Hand1", "Ascl2", "Phlda2", "Cdh1", "Eomes", "Elf5", "Esrrb", "Tfap2c","Junb", "Xrcc4", "Smarcb1", "Tagln2","Cited1","Tpbpa", "Gjb3", "Rhox6", "Rhox9","Gbj5","Adamts1", "Fmnl1", "Cdx2", "Bmp2","Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1","Inhbb", "Pcdh12", "Rora", "Mmp9", "Plac8","Kdr", "Pecam1", "Mest", "Dlk1","Igfbp2", "Bex4", "Bex2", "Nanog", "Pou3f1", "Pou5f1","Klf4", "Otx2", "Sox2")

# Function to create and save feature plots
create_feature_plot <- function(seurat_obj, feature, filename) {
  if (feature %in% rownames(seurat_obj)) {
    p <- FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = feature, 
                     reduction = "umap", order = TRUE) +
      scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("lightgrey", "purple")) +
      ggtitle(feature) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))+
  coord_fixed()
    
    ggsave(filename, p, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
    return(p)
  } else {
    message(paste("Gene", feature, "not found in the dataset."))
    return(NULL)
  }
}

# Create individual feature plots
all_markers <- unique(unlist(genes))
feature_plots_list <- list()
for (marker in all_markers) {
  filename <- paste0("featureplot_", make.names(marker), ".png")
  p <- create_feature_plot(D0.D4, marker, filename)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    feature_plots_list[[marker]] <- p
  }
}

```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the three genes of interest
gene1 <- "Gata3"
gene2 <- "Cdx2"
gene3 <- "Elf5"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

p3 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene3,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene3) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 + p3 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste(gene1, "/", gene2, "/", gene3, "Expression Levels in UMAP"),
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_", gene1, "_", gene2, "_", gene3, "_Expression_Levels.png", sep = ""),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 15,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- D0.D4@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Gata3_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Cdx2_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)],
    Elf5_exp = gene_expression[gene3, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Gata3 = mean(Gata3_exp),
    mean_Cdx2 = mean(Cdx2_exp),
    mean_Elf5 = mean(Elf5_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Gata3 + mean_Cdx2 + mean_Elf5))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "D0D4_Gata3_Cdx2_Elf5_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```

```{r}
# Marker gene list 1, UMAPS, violin plot, dotplot, generates number and percent of cells expressing the gene condition and by cluster 

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes <- c("Gata3", "Pou5f1", "Nanog", "Cdx2", "Elf5", "Ascl2", "Postn", "Gata6", "Jup", "Gata2", 
                  "Gata4", "Klf4", "Krt18", "Sox2", "Btg2", "Tfap2c", "Gcm1", "Tpbpa", "Tfap2a", "Eomes", 
                  "Bmp2", "Wnt6", "Lrp2", "Pitx1", "Pitx2", "Krt7", "Epcam", "Cldn7", "T", "Afp", "Amn", 
                  "Ifitm3", "Ptn", "Twist2", "Isl1", "Tagln", "Acta2", "Fn1", "Foxf1", "Hand1", "Gtf2b", 
                  "Sox4", "Spib", "Nr2f6", "Fos", "Tcf4", "Cebpa", "Taf1", "Elf4", "Tead4", "Bmp4", 
                  "Bmp7", "Fgf4", "Sox17", "Dab2", "Acvrl1", "Acvr1", "Bmpr1b", "Bmpr2", "Psma5", "Psma1", 
                  "Lin28a", "Bcam", "Met", "Egfr", "Cyba", "Phlda2", "Elf3", "Tfrc", "Dio3", "Hbegf", 
                  "Tead3", "Dlx3", "Glis1", "Krt19", "Timp1", "Phactr1", "Tnfaip2", "Ghrh", "Bhlhe40", 
                  "Mmp9", "Fosl1", "Slc16a3", "Gjb5", "Mt2", "Derl3", "Fgfbp1", "Pcdh12", "Adamts1", 
                  "Fmnl1", "Lgr5", "Msx2","Zscan4d")

# Set up PDF device for saving plots
pdf("D0-D4_markers.pdf")

for (i in marker_genes) {


  # Violin Plot by Cluster
  vp_cluster <- VlnPlot(D0.D4, 
                        features = i, 
                        pt.size = 0.2,
                        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",  # Assuming this is your clustering resolution
                        raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Violin Plot for", i, "by Cluster"))  # Title for the plot
  
  print(vp_cluster)

  # Feature Plot colored by clusters
  Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"
  fp <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, reduction = "umap",
                    features = i, 
                    pt.size = 0.2, 
                    raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Feature Plot for", i))  # Title for the plot

  # Add cluster labels to the UMAP
  fp_with_labels <- LabelClusters(fp, id = "ident", size = 5)
  print(fp)
  print(fp_with_labels)
  
}


pdf("D0D4_xintegrate_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster
dp <- DotPlot(D0.D4, 
              features = marker_genes, 
              cols = c("blue", "red"), 
              dot.scale = 6) + 
  RotatedAxis() + 
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(), 
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(), 
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in marker_genes) {
  
  # Get gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  
  # Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
  conditions <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$condition)
  clusters <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)
  
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "D0D4_xintegrate_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "D0D4_xintegrate_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Marker gene list for 2C

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes2c <- c("Zscan4b", "Zscan4c","Zscan4d","Zscan4e","Zscan4f","Tcstv1","Tcstv3", "Gm4340","Tdpoz1","Tdpoz3","Usp17lc","Usp17ld")

# Set up PDF device for saving plots
pdf("D0-D4_markers2c.pdf")

for (i in marker_genes2c) {


  # Violin Plot by Cluster
  vp_cluster <- VlnPlot(D0.D4, 
                        features = i, 
                        pt.size = 0.2,
                        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",  # Assuming this is your clustering resolution
                        raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Violin Plot for", i, "by Cluster"))  # Title for the plot
  
  print(vp_cluster)

  # Feature Plot colored by clusters
  Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"
  fp <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, reduction = "umap",
                    features = i, 
                    pt.size = 0.2, 
                    raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Feature Plot for", i))  # Title for the plot

  # Add cluster labels to the UMAP
  fp_with_labels <- LabelClusters(fp, id = "ident", size = 5)
  print(fp)
  print(fp_with_labels)
  
}


pdf("D0-D4-EpiLC_2C_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster
dp <- DotPlot(D0.D4, 
              features = marker_genes2c, 
              cols = c("blue", "red"), 
              dot.scale = 6) + 
  RotatedAxis() + 
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(), 
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(), 
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in marker_genes2c) {
  
  # Get gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  
  # Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
  conditions <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$condition)
  clusters <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)
  
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "D0-D4_2c_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "D0-D4_2c_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# Marker gene list for totipotency

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"

# List of marker genes
marker_genes_toti <- c("Dppa3","Dppa2","Dppa4","Pou5f1","Nanog", "Sox2","Klf4","Esrrb","Tbx3","Prdm14")

pdf("D0-D4_markers_marker_genes_toti.pdf")

for (i in marker_genes_toti) {


  # Violin Plot by Cluster
  vp_cluster <- VlnPlot(D0.D4, 
                        features = i, 
                        pt.size = 0.2,
                        group.by = "SCT_snn_res.0.6",  # Assuming this is your clustering resolution
                        raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Violin Plot for", i, "by Cluster"))  # Title for the plot
  
  print(vp_cluster)

  # Feature Plot colored by clusters
  Idents(D0.D4) <- "SCT_snn_res.0.6"
  fp <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, reduction = "umap",
                    features = i, 
                    pt.size = 0.2, 
                    raster = FALSE) +
    theme(legend.position = "right") +  # Place legend on the right
    labs(title = paste("Feature Plot for", i))  # Title for the plot

  # Add cluster labels to the UMAP
  fp_with_labels <- LabelClusters(fp, id = "ident", size = 5)
  print(fp)
  print(fp_with_labels)
  
}


pdf("D0-D4-EpiLC_marker_genes_toti_dotplot.pdf", width = 20, height = 8)

# Generate dot plot for all marker genes by cluster
dp <- DotPlot(D0.D4, 
              features = marker_genes_toti, 
              cols = c("blue", "red"), 
              dot.scale = 6) + 
  RotatedAxis() + 
  labs(title = "Dot Plot of Marker Genes by Cluster") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 10),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right",
        legend.key.size = unit(1.5, "lines"))

print(dp)

# Close PDF device
dev.off()

# Initialize data frames to store results for condition and cluster
results_condition <- data.frame(condition = character(), 
                                gene = character(),
                                num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                                percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                                stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

results_cluster <- data.frame(cluster = character(), 
                              gene = character(),
                              num_cells_expressing_gene = integer(),
                              percent_cells_expressing_gene = numeric(),
                              stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Loop through each gene
for (gene in marker_genes_toti) {
  
  # Get gene expression data
  gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
  
  # Get conditions and clusters present in the dataset
  conditions <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$condition)
  clusters <- unique(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6)
  
  # Loop through each condition
  for (condition in conditions) {
    # Identify cells from the current condition
    cells_in_condition <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$condition == condition)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current condition
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_condition] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_condition) * 100
    
    # Append results to the condition data frame
    results_condition <- rbind(results_condition, list(condition = condition,
                                                       gene = gene,
                                                       num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                       percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
  
  # Loop through each cluster
  for (cluster in clusters) {
    # Identify cells from the current cluster
    cells_in_cluster <- which(D0.D4@meta.data$SCT_snn_res.0.6 == cluster)
    
    # Identify cells expressing the current gene within the current cluster
    cells_expressing_gene <- which(gene_expression[gene, cells_in_cluster] > 0)
    
    # Count cells expressing the current gene
    num_cells_expressing_gene <- length(cells_expressing_gene)
    
    # Calculate the percentage of cells expressing the current gene
    percent_cells_expressing_gene <- num_cells_expressing_gene / length(cells_in_cluster) * 100
    
    # Append results to the cluster data frame
    results_cluster <- rbind(results_cluster, list(cluster = cluster,
                                                   gene = gene,
                                                   num_cells_expressing_gene = num_cells_expressing_gene,
                                                   percent_cells_expressing_gene = percent_cells_expressing_gene))
  }
}

# Print the results
print(results_condition)
print(results_cluster)

# Save results to CSV files
write.csv(results_condition, file = "D0-D4_marker_genes_toti_markers_gene_expression_results_by_condition_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(results_cluster, file = "D0-D4_marker_genes_toti_markers_gene_expression_results_by_cluster_markers.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Define the four genes of interest
gene1 <- "Zscan4d"
gene2 <- "Zscan4c"
gene3 <- "Gm4340"
gene4 <- "Usp17lc"

# Create individual UMAP feature plots for each gene
p1 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene1,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene1) +
  coord_fixed()

p2 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene2,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene2) +
  coord_fixed()

p3 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene3,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene3) +
  coord_fixed()

p4 <- FeaturePlot(D0.D4, 
                  features = gene4,
                  reduction = "umap",
                  pt.size = 0.2,
                  order = TRUE) +
  scale_color_gradientn(colors = c("grey90", "purple")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    legend.key.size = unit(1.2, "lines"),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black")
  ) +
  labs(title = gene4) +
  coord_fixed()

# Combine plots horizontally using patchwork
combined_plot <- p1 + p2 + p3 + p4 +
  plot_layout(ncol = 4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Zscan4 Family and Related Genes Expression Levels in UMAP",
    theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
  )

# Save the combined plot
ggsave(
  paste("UMAP_Zscan4_family_Expression_Levels.png"),
  plot = combined_plot,
  width = 20,    # Increased width to accommodate 4 plots side by side
  height = 5,    # Reduced height since we're using a single row
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Calculate expression statistics
gene_expression <- GetAssayData(object = D0.D4, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# Calculate mean expression per condition
condition_stats <- D0.D4@meta.data %>%
  mutate(
    Zscan4d_exp = gene_expression[gene1, rownames(.)],
    Zscan4c_exp = gene_expression[gene2, rownames(.)],
    Gm5662_exp = gene_expression[gene3, rownames(.)],
    Usp17lc_exp = gene_expression[gene4, rownames(.)]
  ) %>%
  group_by(condition) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_Zscan4d = mean(Zscan4d_exp),
    mean_Zscan4c = mean(Zscan4c_exp),
    mean_Gm5662 = mean(Gm5662_exp),
    mean_Usp17lc = mean(Usp17lc_exp),
    n_cells = n()
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_Zscan4d + mean_Zscan4c + mean_Gm5662 + mean_Usp17lc))

# Save statistics to CSV file
write.csv(condition_stats, 
          "D0D4_Zscan4_family_expression_conditions_continuous.csv", 
          row.names = FALSE)

# Print statistics to console
print("Expression statistics by condition:")
print(condition_stats)
```

```{r}
save(D0.D4, file="cells.combined_D0D4.rdata")
```


```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#

```



```{r}
if (!require("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")

BiocManager::install(version = "3.18")
BiocManager::install(c("GenomicFeatures", "AnnotationDbi"))

BiocManager::install("slingshot")
BiocManager::install("tidymodels")
BiocManager::install("BUSpaRse")
BiocManager::install("SingleCellExperiment")
BiocManager::install("scry")
BiocManager::install("RColorBrewer")


  
library(slingshot)
library(BUSpaRse)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(Seurat)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(Matrix)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scry)
```

```{r}

BiocManager::install(c("GenomicFeatures", "AnnotationDbi"))
BiocManager::install("scuttle")
BiocManager::install("scater")

library(scuttle)
library(scater)

```





```{r}

#load treatment rdata - "cells.combined_mCell_Treatmentonlyintegrate.rdata"
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(Seurat) 
library(SeuratObject) 
library(SummarizedExperiment)

D0.D4 <- NormalizeData(D0.D4, assay = "RNA")  # Normalize RNA data
D0.D4 <- ScaleData(D0.D4, assay = "RNA")       # Scale RNA data

table(Idents(D0.D4))


DefaultAssay(D0.D4) <- "RNA"

# Optionally join RNA layers if not already done
D0.D4[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(D0.D4[["RNA"]])

D0.D4.sce <- SingleCellExperiment(D0.D4)

```

```{r}
## explore the SCE object ----

pca <- Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "pca")
umap <- Embeddings(D0.D4, reduction = "umap")
reducedDims(D0.D4.sce) <- SimpleList(PCA = pca, UMAP = umap)
print(names(reducedDims(D0.D4.sce)))
D0.D4.sce$SCT_snn_res.0.6 <- D0.D4$SCT_snn_res.0.6
dim(reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "PCA"))
dim(reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP"))

plotReducedDim(D0.D4.sce, dimred="PCA", colour_by="SCT_snn_res.0.6")
plotReducedDim(D0.D4.sce, dimred="UMAP", colour_by="SCT_snn_res.0.6")

```
```{r}
# Load necessary libraries
library(slingshot)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r}
# Convert Seurat object to SingleCellExperiment
D0.D4.sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(D0.D4)

# Add UMAP coordinates to SingleCellExperiment object
reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP") <- Embeddings(D0.D4, "umap")

# Run slingshot with defined starting point
D0.D4.sce <- slingshot(D0.D4.sce, reducedDim = "UMAP",
                       clusterLabels = D0.D4.sce$SCT_snn_res.0.6,
                       start.clus = "1",  # Force start from cluster 0
                       stretch = 0, 
                       extend = "n")

# Create a base filename
file_name_base <- "slingshot_trajectory_"

# Get pseudotime columns
pseudotime_cols <- grep("slingPseudotime_", colnames(colData(D0.D4.sce)), value = TRUE)

# Loop through each pseudotime
for (pseudotime_col in pseudotime_cols) {
  # Extract lineage number
  lineage_num <- gsub("slingPseudotime_", "", pseudotime_col)
  
  # Extract pseudotime values
  pseudotime_values <- colData(D0.D4.sce)[[pseudotime_col]]
  
  # Create a data frame for plotting
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    UMAP_1 = reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP")[,1],
    UMAP_2 = reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP")[,2],
    Pseudotime = pseudotime_values,
    Cluster = D0.D4.sce$SCT_snn_res.0.6
  )
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Pseudotime), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey50") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("Slingshot Trajectory - Lineage", lineage_num),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2", color = "Pseudotime") +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  # Add cluster labels
  cluster_centers <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(Cluster) %>%
    summarise(UMAP_1 = mean(UMAP_1),
              UMAP_2 = mean(UMAP_2))
  
  p <- p + geom_text(data = cluster_centers, 
                     aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, label = Cluster),
                     color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 4)
  
  # Add trajectory lines
  sds <- SlingshotDataSet(D0.D4.sce)
  lineages <- slingLineages(sds)
  curves <- slingCurves(sds)
  
  for (i in seq_along(curves)) {
    curve_data <- data.frame(UMAP_1 = curves[[i]]$s[,1], UMAP_2 = curves[[i]]$s[,2])
    p <- p + geom_path(data = curve_data, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2), 
                       color = "black", size = 1, lineend = "round")
  }
  
  # Save plot
  ggsave(paste0(file_name_base, "lineage_", lineage_num, ".png"), 
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}

# Save Slingshot results
saveRDS(D0.D4.sce, "slingshot_results.rds")

# Print summary of results
cat("Slingshot analysis complete. Results saved in 'slingshot_results.rds'.\n")
cat("Number of lineages identified:", length(pseudotime_cols), "\n")
cat("Trajectory plots saved with prefix:", file_name_base, "\n")
```


```{r}
#if you want to not force the starting point
# Convert Seurat object to SingleCellExperiment
D0.D4.sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(D0.D4)

# Add UMAP coordinates to SingleCellExperiment object
reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP") <- Embeddings(D0.D4, "umap")

# Run slingshot
D0.D4.sce <- slingshot(D0.D4.sce, reducedDim = "UMAP",
                       clusterLabels = D0.D4.sce$SCT_snn_res.0.6,
                       stretch = 0, 
                       extend = "n")

# Create a base filename
file_name_base <- "slingshot_trajectory_"

# Get pseudotime columns
pseudotime_cols <- grep("slingPseudotime_", colnames(colData(D0.D4.sce)), value = TRUE)

# Loop through each pseudotime
for (pseudotime_col in pseudotime_cols) {
  # Extract lineage number
  lineage_num <- gsub("slingPseudotime_", "", pseudotime_col)
  
  # Extract pseudotime values
  pseudotime_values <- colData(D0.D4.sce)[[pseudotime_col]]
  
  # Create a data frame for plotting
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    UMAP_1 = reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP")[,1],
    UMAP_2 = reducedDim(D0.D4.sce, "UMAP")[,2],
    Pseudotime = pseudotime_values,
    Cluster = D0.D4.sce$SCT_snn_res.0.6
  )
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = Pseudotime), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "C", na.value = "grey50") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = paste("Slingshot Trajectory - Lineage", lineage_num),
         x = "UMAP 1", y = "UMAP 2", color = "Pseudotime") +
    theme(legend.position = "right")
  
  # Add cluster labels
  cluster_centers <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(Cluster) %>%
    summarise(UMAP_1 = mean(UMAP_1),
              UMAP_2 = mean(UMAP_2))
  
  p <- p + geom_text(data = cluster_centers, 
                     aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2, label = Cluster),
                     color = "black", fontface = "bold", size = 4)
  
  # Add trajectory lines
  sds <- SlingshotDataSet(D0.D4.sce)
  lineages <- slingLineages(sds)
  curves <- slingCurves(sds)
  
  for (i in seq_along(curves)) {
    curve_data <- data.frame(UMAP_1 = curves[[i]]$s[,1], UMAP_2 = curves[[i]]$s[,2])
    p <- p + geom_path(data = curve_data, aes(x = UMAP_1, y = UMAP_2), 
                       color = "black", size = 1, lineend = "round")
  }
  
  # Save plot
  ggsave(paste0(file_name_base, "lineage_", lineage_num, ".png"), 
         plot = p, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
}

# Save Slingshot results
saveRDS(D0.D4.sce, "slingshot_results.rds")

# Print summary of results
cat("Slingshot analysis complete. Results saved in 'slingshot_results.rds'.\n")
cat("Number of lineages identified:", length(pseudotime_cols), "\n")
cat("Trajectory plots saved with prefix:", file_name_base, "\n")
```

```{r}

#top 50 genes by variance 

# Load necessary libraries
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(slingshot)
library(dplyr)

# Function to get top variable genes for a specific trajectory
get_top_variable_genes <- function(sce, trajectory, n = 50) {
  pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce)[,trajectory]
  expr_data <- assay(sce, "logcounts")
  
  # Remove NA pseudotime values
  valid_cells <- !is.na(pseudotime)
  pseudotime <- pseudotime[valid_cells]
  expr_data <- expr_data[, valid_cells]
  
  # Order cells by pseudotime
  ordered_indices <- order(pseudotime)
  expr_data <- expr_data[, ordered_indices]
  
  # Calculate variance along pseudotime
  gene_var <- apply(expr_data, 1, var)
  
  # Get top variable genes
  top_genes <- names(sort(gene_var, decreasing = TRUE)[1:n])
  
  # Create a data frame with gene names and variances
  result <- data.frame(
    gene = top_genes,
    variance = gene_var[top_genes],
    trajectory = trajectory
  )
  
  return(result)
}

# Main script
# Assuming D0.D4.sce is your SingleCellExperiment object with Slingshot results

# Get number of trajectories
n_trajectories <- ncol(slingPseudotime(D0.D4.sce))

# List to store results for each trajectory
all_results <- list()

# Get top variable genes for each trajectory
for (i in 1:n_trajectories) {
  all_results[[i]] <- get_top_variable_genes(D0.D4.sce, trajectory = i, n = 50)
  cat("Processed trajectory", i, "\n")
}

# Combine results from all trajectories
all_top_genes <- do.call(rbind, all_results)

# Write results to CSV
write.csv(all_top_genes, "top_50_variable_genes_per_trajectory.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nTop 50 variable genes for each trajectory have been saved to 'top_50_variable_genes_per_trajectory.csv'\n")
```

```{r}
#Code to run FitGam which will take a long time, but only using top 6000 genes in the dataset 

# Function to check and install packages
check_and_install <- function(package_name, bioc = FALSE) {
  if (!requireNamespace(package_name, quietly = TRUE)) {
    if (bioc) {
      if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
        install.packages("BiocManager")
      BiocManager::install(package_name)
    } else {
      install.packages(package_name)
    }
  }
  library(package_name, character.only = TRUE)
}

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE))
    install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("tradeSeq")

library(tradeSeq)

# Check and install required packages
check_and_install("SingleCellExperiment", bioc = TRUE)
check_and_install("slingshot", bioc = TRUE)
check_and_install("tradeSeq", bioc = TRUE)
check_and_install("scran", bioc = TRUE)
check_and_install("dplyr", bioc = FALSE)

# Make sure tradeSeq is loaded
library(tradeSeq)

cat("Testing for dynamic expression...\n")
test_time <- system.time({
  # Try testDynamic first
  tryCatch({
    dynResults <- tradeSeq::testDynamic(sce)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If testDynamic fails, use associationTest
    message("testDynamic failed, using associationTest instead")
    dynResults <<- tradeSeq::associationTest(sce)
  })
})
cat(sprintf("Time taken to test for dynamic expression: %.2f seconds\n\n", test_time["elapsed"]))

# Check the structure of dynResults
str(dynResults)
```


```{r}
start_time <- Sys.time()

# Assuming D0.D4.sce is your SingleCellExperiment object with Slingshot results

cat("Selecting top 6000 variable genes...\n")
gene_var_time <- system.time({
  # Calculate gene variances
  gene_vars <- modelGeneVar(D0.D4.sce)
  # Select top 6000 variable genes
  top_genes <- getTopHVGs(gene_vars, n = 6000)
  # Subset the SCE object
  D0.D4.sce <- D0.D4.sce[top_genes,]
})
cat(sprintf("Time taken to select variable genes: %.2f seconds\n\n", gene_var_time["elapsed"]))

cat("Fitting GAM models...\n")
fit_time <- system.time({
  set.seed(123)  # for reproducibility
  sce <- fitGAM(D0.D4.sce, nknots = 6)
})
cat(sprintf("Time taken to fit GAM models: %.2f minutes\n\n", fit_time["elapsed"] / 60))

cat("Testing for dynamic expression...\n")
test_time <- system.time({
  dynResults <- testDynamic(sce)
})
cat(sprintf("Time taken to test for dynamic expression: %.2f seconds\n\n", test_time["elapsed"]))

# Function to get top genes for each lineage
get_top_genes_per_lineage <- function(dynResults, n = 50) {
  dynResults %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    mutate(gene = rownames(.)) %>%
    group_by(lineage) %>%
    top_n(n, wt = -pvalue) %>%
    arrange(lineage, pvalue) %>%
    ungroup()
}

cat("Selecting top 50 genes per lineage...\n")
select_time <- system.time({
  top_genes <- get_top_genes_per_lineage(dynResults, n = 50)
})
cat(sprintf("Time taken to select top genes: %.2f seconds\n\n", select_time["elapsed"]))

# Write results to CSV
write.csv(top_genes, "top_50_dynamic_genes_per_lineage_fitGAM.csv", row.names = FALSE)

end_time <- Sys.time()
total_time <- difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "mins")

cat(sprintf("Total runtime: %.2f minutes\n", as.numeric(total_time)))
cat("Top 50 dynamic genes for each lineage have been saved to 'top_50_dynamic_genes_per_lineage_fitGAM.csv'\n")

# Print summary of results
cat("\nSummary of results:\n")
cat(sprintf("Number of lineages: %d\n", length(unique(top_genes$lineage))))
cat(sprintf("Total number of significant genes: %d\n", nrow(dynResults)))
cat(sprintf("Number of genes selected per lineage: %d\n", length(unique(top_genes$gene))))
```

```{r}
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(tradeSeq)
library(ggplot2)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(pheatmap)
library(dplyr)
library(gridExtra)

# Assuming 'sce' is your SingleCellExperiment object after fitGAM
# and 'top_genes' is your data frame of top genes

# Function to create heatmap of top genes
create_top_genes_heatmap <- function(sce, top_genes, lineage) {
  expr_data <- assay(sce, "counts")[unique(top_genes$gene), ]
  pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce, na = FALSE)[,lineage]
  cell_order <- order(pseudotime)
  
  heatmap <- Heatmap(expr_data[,cell_order], 
                     name = "Expression",
                     cluster_rows = FALSE, 
                     cluster_columns = FALSE,
                     show_column_names = FALSE,
                     column_title = paste("Pseudotime - Lineage", lineage),
                     col = colorRamp2(c(min(expr_data), mean(expr_data), max(expr_data)), 
                                      c("blue", "white", "red")))
  
  png(paste0("heatmap_top_genes_lineage_", lineage, ".png"), width = 1200, height = 800)
  print(heatmap)
  dev.off()
}

# Function to create gene expression curves
create_gene_expression_curves <- function(sce, top_genes, lineage) {
  pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce, na = FALSE)[,lineage]
  top_9_genes <- top_genes$gene[1:9]
  
  plot_gene_curve <- function(gene) {
    curve_data <- data.frame(
      Pseudotime = pseudotime,
      Expression = assay(sce, "counts")[gene, ]
    )
    
    ggplot(curve_data, aes(x = Pseudotime, y = Expression)) +
      geom_point(alpha = 0.1) +
      geom_smooth(method = "loess") +
      ggtitle(gene) +
      theme_minimal()
  }
  
  plots <- lapply(top_9_genes, plot_gene_curve)
  
  png(paste0("gene_expression_curves_lineage_", lineage, ".png"), width = 1200, height = 1200)
  print(gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = plots, ncol = 3))
  dev.off()
}

# Function to create trajectory plot with gene expression
create_trajectory_plot <- function(sce, top_genes, lineage) {
  umap_coords <- reducedDim(sce, "UMAP")
  pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce, na = FALSE)[,lineage]
  top_gene <- top_genes$gene[1]
  
  plot_data <- data.frame(
    UMAP1 = umap_coords[,1],
    UMAP2 = umap_coords[,2],
    Pseudotime = pseudotime,
    Expression = assay(sce, "counts")[top_gene, ]
  )
  
  p1 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Pseudotime)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(paste("UMAP colored by Pseudotime - Lineage", lineage))
  
  p2 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2, color = Expression)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_viridis_c() +
    theme_minimal() +
    ggtitle(paste("Expression of", top_gene, "- Lineage", lineage))
  
  png(paste0("trajectory_plot_lineage_", lineage, ".png"), width = 1600, height = 800)
  print(gridExtra::grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2))
  dev.off()
}

# Function to create clustered heatmap of gene modules
create_gene_modules_heatmap <- function(sce, top_genes, lineage) {
  expr_data <- assay(sce, "counts")[unique(top_genes$gene), ]
  pseudotime <- slingPseudotime(sce, na = FALSE)[,lineage]
  cell_order <- order(pseudotime)
  
  gene_clusters <- hclust(dist(expr_data))
  cut_tree <- cutree(gene_clusters, k = 5)  # Adjust k as needed
  ordered_genes <- names(sort(cut_tree))
  
  png(paste0("gene_modules_heatmap_lineage_", lineage, ".png"), width = 1200, height = 800)
  print(pheatmap(expr_data[ordered_genes, cell_order],
                 show_rownames = FALSE,
                 cluster_rows = FALSE,
                 cluster_cols = FALSE,
                 annotation_row = data.frame(Cluster = factor(cut_tree[ordered_genes])),
                 main = paste("Gene Modules along Pseudotime - Lineage", lineage)))
  dev.off()
}

# Get the number of lineages
n_lineages <- ncol(slingPseudotime(sce))

# Loop through each lineage and create visualizations
for (lineage in 1:n_lineages) {
  cat(sprintf("Processing lineage %d...\n", lineage))
  
  # Get top genes for this lineage
  lineage_top_genes <- top_genes %>% filter(lineage == !!lineage)
  
  create_top_genes_heatmap(sce, lineage_top_genes, lineage)
  create_gene_expression_curves(sce, lineage_top_genes, lineage)
  create_trajectory_plot(sce, lineage_top_genes, lineage)
  create_gene_modules_heatmap(sce, lineage_top_genes, lineage)
  
  cat(sprintf("Finished processing lineage %d.\n\n", lineage))
}

cat("All visualizations have been created and saved.\n")
```

```{r}
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
#
```



```{r}

```
